metadata.direction: Grammar point ID → list of sentence IDs demonstrating the pattern.

field_notes.mapping: Enables 'show me sentences using this grammar pattern' queries. Sentence IDs may be Tatoeba IDs (plain) or KFTT IDs (prefixed 'kftt:').

metadata.source: Derived cross-reference built from data/grammar/grammar.json by build/transform/cross_links.py.
